prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南昌大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别约为14389、14087、13798、15428、14102名。近五年位次在13798–15428区间波动，2024年曾后移至15428，2025年回升至14102，整体呈震荡态势，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约14102名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021年8人、2022–2024年各6人、2025年5人，呈逐年缩减态势；2026年计划仅2人，较2025年缩招60%，为近六年最低。大幅缩招意味着供给显著减少，按供需弹性原理，同等需求下竞争压力减轻，位次有前移动力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学为国家"211工程"、"双一流"建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第78名→2026年第74名，稳居全国百强，综合实力稳步提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；2026年声誉评价偏正面：南昌大学男排在2025–2026赛季CUVA大学生排球联赛总决赛中以3:0战胜北京体育大学夺冠，大幅提升学校社会曝光度与体育声誉；学校对相关争议的积极回应也展现了良好管理形象。抖音热度排名第43位（较热），短视频平台关注度较高，反映报考热度升温。历史投档异常信号为低关注，未见明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，南昌大学食品科学与工程获评A+（全国顶尖），是该校唯一A-及以上学科，在食品领域具有显著学科优势，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学（经济学双学位）为2026年唯一招生专业，法学专业社会热度2024年评估为"分化观望"，整体偏稳；材料科学与工程属"生化环材"大类，2024年评估为"一般观望"，较此前"明显劝退"有所回暖。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约30%，考生规模大幅扩大，整体竞争环境显著加剧。；南昌大学位于江西省，在京招生计划极少（2026年仅2人），属跨省招生；本地考生对省外211高校的报考意愿受地域偏好影响，但该校作为江西省唯一211，品牌认知度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅缩减60%带来的位次前移动力，以及北京市考生总数增长约30%加剧整体竞争、学校声誉正面提升吸引力等反向因素，在2025年基准14102名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次前移至约9275名。预测最低位次9275名，乐观区间8775–9775名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年南昌大学在北京市综合类仅招生法学（经济学双学位项目）2人，专业选择极为有限。位次在预测区间8775–9775名内，建议以法学（双学位）为核心目标；位次优于区间 下限可大胆填报，位次接近区间上限需谨慎。由于招生人数极少，报考不确定性较大，建议同时准备其他同层次211高校作为备选。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nanchang University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 14389, 14087, 13798, 15428, and 14102 respectively. Over the past five years, rankings fluctuated within the range of 13798–15428, with a shift to 15428 in 2024 and a recovery to 14102 in 2025, showing an overall volatile trend without a clear unilateral direction. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 14102. The enrollment plan for Nanchang University in Beijing's comprehensive category was 8 students in 2021, 6 students each year from 2022 to 2024, and 5 students in 2025, showing a gradual reduction trend. The 2026 plan is only 2 students, a 60% reduction compared to 2025, the lowest in the past six years. A significant reduction in enrollment means a notable decrease in supply. According to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, under the same demand, competition pressure eases, and rankings have momentum to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a national "211 Project" and "Double First-Class" construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years, from 78th in 2021 to 74th in 2026, firmly among the top 100 nationally, with steadily improving comprehensive strength, enhancing its appeal to candidates. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive: Nanchang University's men's volleyball team won the 2025–2026 CUVA University Volleyball League finals with a 3:0 victory over Beijing Sport University, significantly boosting the school's social exposure and sports reputation. The school's proactive response to related controversies also demonstrated a good management image. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), with high attention on short video platforms, reflecting rising application enthusiasm. The historical abnormal signal for admission is low attention, with no obvious record of gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Nanchang University's Food Science and Engineering was rated A+ (top nationally), the only discipline rated A- or above, giving it a significant disciplinary advantage in the food field, strongly attracting candidates in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (Economics Dual Degree) is the only enrollment major for 2026. The social popularity of the law major in 2024 was assessed as "differentiated wait-and-see," overall relatively stable. Materials Science and Engineering belongs to the "biology, chemistry, environment, materials" category, assessed in 2024 as "general wait-and-see," showing some recovery from the previous "clearly discouraged" status. The total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 30% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, with a very small enrollment plan in Beijing (only 2 students in 2026), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Local candidates' willingness to apply to out-of-province 211 universities is influenced by regional preferences, but as the only 211 university in Jiangxi Province, its brand recognition is relatively high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the momentum for ranking advancement due to the significant 60% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, as well as the opposing factors such as the intensified overall competition from a 30% increase in Beijing's total candidate count and the positive reputation enhancement attracting candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 14102, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is predicted to advance to approximately 9275. The predicted minimum ranking is 9275, with an optimistic range of 8775–9775.

- Law (Economics Dual Degree Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) (Historical enrollment, not specified for 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Economics (Historical enrollment, not specified for 2026)
- Journalism and Communication Studies (Historical enrollment, not specified for 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Historical enrollment, not specified for 2026)
- Anesthesiology (Five-Year Program) (Historical enrollment, not specified for 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Nanchang University only enrolls 2 students in the Law (Economics Dual Degree) program in Beijing's comprehensive category, making major choices extremely limited. For rankings within the predicted range of 8775–9775, it is recommended to target Law (Dual Degree) as the core goal. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range, you can boldly apply; if the ranking is close to the upper limit, caution is needed. Due to the very small number of enrollments, the application uncertainty is high, so it is advisable to also prepare other 211 universities at the same level as backups.
